entry.title: New: BILL041(26) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO TRANSPORTATION.

Conforms ROH provisions to House Bill 2021, HD2, SD2, CD1, Relating to Transportation. Adds definitions for “Electric Bicycle,” “Class 1 Electric Bicycle,” Class 2 Electric Bicycle,” Class 3 Electric Bicycle, “Electric Micro-mobility Device, “High-speed Electric Device,” and “Electric Motorcycle.” Substitutes the term “electric bicycle” for the terms “bicycle with motor,” “motorized bicycles,” and similar terms. Substitutes the term “motor-driven cycle” for the term “motor scooter.” Regulates riding electric bicycles on sidewalks under certain circumstances. Prohibits on bikeways: (1) driving a vehicle, other than a bicycle, electric foot scooter, or electric micro-mobility device, with specified exceptions; and (2) operating mopeds or electric motorcycles. Prohibits a person under the age of sixteen from operating a class 2 or class 3 electric bicycle without direct supervision. Repeals as preempted: (1) certain safe driving requirements for the operation of electric bicycles on public streets, paths, or tra

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
